rules.name: Internal transfer legs
rules.legacy: Transfers often appear as cash-in legs in roznamcha stream (Transfers module dominant on DIN CHINA)
rules.preview: Unified RPC shows both debit and credit legs on liquidity accounts (transfer ref type: in + out)

rules.name: Void/reversal in normal mode
rules.legacy: getRoznamcha excludes voided_at / is_void when auditMode=false
rules.preview: effective_party basis excludes correction_reversal per RPC; void handling may differ

rules.name: Opening balance rows
rules.legacy: Opening from roznamcha summary; period rows only in table
rules.preview: RPC period_opening_balance + may include opening_balance_account reference rows

rules.name: Source module filter
rules.preview: Same filter on inferred modules from unified rows

rules.name: Branch scope
rules.legacy: branchId from context; global filter may not override selected branch
rules.preview: Same branchId passed to RPC scope

rules.name: Running balance
rules.preview: RPC running balance on unified lines

rules.name: Preview basis
rules.legacy: Normal mode uses effective_party semantics via roznamcha
